# Redeeming Points

Points are redeemed in blocks of one hundred, where one hundred points equal a five-dollar account credit applied at checkout. Redemptions cannot be combined with clearance pricing, and the credit is forfeited if the order is later returned for a reimbursement. Unused points expire eighteen months after they were earned.

[Source: loyalty_program.md#redeeming-points]
